text: <par>is the tone mark correct? see the other form <latinform>sāo</latinform>, imported from Ken's PKC. Also, note that this set includes forms from both PKC #626 and PKC #694. Do both sets descend from this root?</par>
<par>KVB: Inclusion of Sizang form is an error in the original.</par>
<par>Gloss has typo in original source: 'occasion, anniversay'</par>

<par>In Hakha Lai there is a little difference between  <latinform>thlaak</latinform> and <latinform>thlaʔ</latinform>.  <latinform>thlaak</latinform> is used when the descendant reflects the source (e.g. <latinform>ʔa-pâa thlaak</latinform> 'image of his father') whereas <latinform>thlaʔ</latinform> is used when the existence of the descendant is caused by the source (e.g. <latinform>ʔa-pâa thlaʔ</latinform> 'the father’s descendant') (VanBik 2009:299).</par>
